examples.title: Basic Vertex Shader Example
examples.description: Simple vertex shader demonstrating position transformation and attribute passing
examples.explanation: This vertex shader receives vertex attributes (position, normal, texture coords), transforms them using model-view-projection matrices, and passes interpolated data to the fragment shader.

examples.title: Basic Fragment Shader Example
examples.description: Simple fragment shader with basic lighting and texture sampling
examples.explanation: This fragment shader calculates ambient, diffuse, and specular lighting (Phong model), samples a texture, and outputs the final fragment color.

examples.title: Geometry Shader Example
examples.description: Geometry shader that creates wireframe outlines
examples.explanation: The geometry shader takes triangles as input and outputs a line strip, creating an outline effect by expanding vertices along the face normal.

examples.title: Render Pass with Multiple Render Targets
examples.description: Pseudocode demonstrating MRT (Multiple Render Targets) rendering
examples.explanation: This demonstrates rendering to multiple render targets simultaneously - useful for deferred rendering, G-buffers, and post-processing effects.
